title: Alex's Mobs (Unofficial Port)
description: 85+ New mobs with stylistic quality above the default game.
body:
Requires: [Citadel (Unofficial Port)](https://modrinth.com/mod/citadel-(1.21.1-port))

**About This Port:**  
This port updates Alex's Mobs to work with Minecraft 1.21.1 and the NeoForge mod loader. This is a community-maintained port and is not officially affiliated with the original Alex's Mobs developers.  

**Original Mod:**  
[Alex's Mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-mobs) by AlexModGuy and contributors.

**License:**  
This project is licensed under the GNU General Public License v3.0 (GPLv3), inheriting the license from the original Alex's Mobs mod.

**Credits:**  
**Original Mod Authors:**  
[AlexModGuy](https://modrinth.com/user/AlexModGuy) (Lead Developer)  
[Other original contributors]

**Disclaimer:**  
This is an unofficial community port. All credit for the original mod design, artwork, models, and code goes to the original Alex's Mobs team. This port exists to make the mod available for newer Minecraft versions while we await an official update.

**Support:**  
For issues specific to this 1.21.1 port, please report them to the github repo linked on this page.
